sparql: PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> SELECT ?person WHERE { { GRAPH <kg:abox> { <http://ex/org/dana> org:manages ?person . } } UNION { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { <http://ex/org/dana> org:manages ?person . } } }
PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> SELECT ?manager WHERE { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { <http://ex/org/omar> org:reportsTo ?manager . } }
PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> SELECT ?person WHERE { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { ?person org:reportsTo <http://ex/org/erin> . } }
PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> ASK WHERE { GRAPH <kg:abox> { <http://ex/org/quinn> a org:Person . } }
PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> ASK { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { <http://ex/org/sofia> a org:Person . } }

PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> ASK { GRAPH <kg:abox> { <http://ex/org/pat> rdf:type org:Contractor . <http://ex/org/pat> rdf:type org:FullTime . } }

PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> ASK { { SELECT ?m1 ?m2 WHERE { { <http://ex/org/lee> org:reportsTo ?m1 . } UNION { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { <http://ex/org/lee> org:reportsTo ?m1 . } } { <http://ex/org/lee> org:reportsTo ?m2 . } UNION { GRAPH <kg:inferred> { <http://ex/org/lee> org:reportsTo ?m2 . } } FILTER (?m1 != ?m2) } } }
PREFIX org: <http://ex/org#> SELECT ?team FROM <kg:abox> WHERE { <http://ex/org/dana> org:memberOf ?team . }
